author: andrewkopylev
description: Bridge your vault across devices through your own SSH/SFTP server. Bidirectional sync with conflict resolution, multi-device safety, and full self-hosting. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Andrew Kopylev
manifest.description: Bridge your vault across devices through your own SSH/SFTP server. Bidirectional sync with conflict resolution, multi-device safety, and full self-hosting.
manifest.name: Vault Bridge SFTP

name: Vault Bridge SFTP

releases.author: andrewkopylev
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- Zero-byte file downloads crashed because ssh2-sftp-client (via concat-stream) returns an empty array `[]` instead of `Buffer.alloc(0)` for files of length 0. Defensive Buffer coercion added in transfer.ts and pull-engine.ts.

UI:
- Simplified the Password setting description to a minimal phrasing the sentence-case rule accepts unconditionally.

releases.author: andrewkopylev
releases.description: Drop algorithm details ("AES-256-GCM") from the Password setting description — `obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case` doesn't recognise these acronyms and rewrites them to lowercase. Cryptographic details remain documented in README. No functional changes.

releases.author: andrewkopylev
releases.description:
## ObsidianReviewBot pass
                                                                                                                                        
- Removed all `eslint-disable` comments for the sentence-case rule (the rule disallows them).
- Rewrote setting descriptions and placeholders so they pass `obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case` legitimately.
- Empty `catch (_var)` → bare `catch { }`.
                                                                                                                                        
  No functional changes. Output is identical to 0.9.7.

releases.author: andrewkopylev
releases.description:
## Fixes for Obsidian community-store review                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                      
  - Drop hardcoded `.obsidian` paths — use `Vault#configDir` everywhere.                                                                
  - All UI strings reviewed for sentence case.                                                                                        
  - Replace `console.log` with `console.debug` (allowed loggers only).                                                                  
  - Use `activeWindow.setTimeout/clearTimeout` for popout-window compatibility.                                                         
  - Wrap async callbacks in `() => { void func(); }` to satisfy `no-misused-promises`.                                                  
  - Tighten error stringification, fix empty catch blocks, remove unused imports.                                                       
  - `onunload` now synchronous wrapper; async cleanup is fire-and-forget.                                                               
                                                                                                                                        
  No functional changes — runtime behavior is identical to 0.9.6.

releases.author: andrewkopylev
releases.description:
- Password and key passphrase are now encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM) with a per-device key in `state/secret.key`.                    
  - SSH host key pinning (TOFU): the server fingerprint is recorded on first connect; subsequent mismatches refuse to connect. New
  command: "Forget remembered host fingerprint".                                                                                        
  - Parallel SFTP transfers — uploads and downloads now run concurrently inside a single SSH connection. Configurable in settings
  (default 8, range 1-20). Major speedup on vaults with many small files.                                                               
  - Plugin no longer attempts to connect on activation when no credentials are configured.
  - Settings UI brought up to Obsidian community store guidelines (CSS classes, sentence-case headings, `setHeading()` for sections).
releases.name: Vault Bridge SFTP 0.9.6
